target: code sweep — complexity, duplication, unimplemented code (implement-or-delete)
note: Iter2 (2026-06-14): src/ sweep. (a) zero todo!/unimplemented!/TODO/FIXME — no actionable unimpl debt; ForkClose no-op + McpError/RpcError coexistence are DELIBERATE design. (b) clippy orphan store.rs:519 RESOLVED by 4bf0b09 (clippy --lib exit 0). (c) DUP FIXED: 12-line #[cfg(test)] stub_vector copy-pasted in ingest/session_mirror.rs + ingest/file_watcher.rs -> one ingest::stub_one_hot; 89 tests green (commit f953296). Iter3: DUP FIXED: reembed.rs inlined the ephemeral-port axum serve boilerplate twice -> local `serve(app)->(url,handle)` helper; 2 tests green. EVALUATED+DEFERRED: cross-module consolidation of the `serve` helper (embed.rs/profile_cmd.rs/locomo_run.rs each have a near-identical copy) — test_utils is a separate crate unreachable from unit tests, and a crate-level #[cfg(test)] module for 4-line boilerplate costs locality > it saves; left per-module on purpose.
next_iteration_candidates: No complexity tooling installed (tokei/lizard/jscpd all absent) — ratings are judged, not measured. Consider `cargo install tokei` for LOC and a duplication scan to sharpen future passes.

Largest production files to deep-rate for complexity next: src/commands.rs (1150), src/base/graph.rs (1086), src/base/accept.rs (1056), src/rpc/kern_rpc_server.rs (978), src/base/store.rs (943), src/base/hnsw.rs (941).
